name: The Muddy Road
objective: Reach the village with the supply carriage intact.
intro_text: Day one on the courier roster. The quartermaster says if I can get flour to Elmsford without losing a wheel to the mud, the longer runs are mine.
outro_text: The flour reaches Elmsford dry — the longer contracts are mine now.

route_choices.name: Wagon Track
route_choices.description: A longer road with predictable mud.

route_choices.name: Old Shortcut
route_choices.description: Cut through wolf country for a faster trip.

name: Bandit Bend
objective: Keep the bandits away from the cargo hold.
intro_text: Elmsford paid on time, so the guild trusts me with grain and tools now. Woodcutter Pass is next, and they say its bends have swallowed careless drivers and their cargo both.
outro_text: Grain and tools delivered; word of a steady hand travels fast.

route_choices.name: Guarded Crossing
route_choices.description: Pay attention to ambush lanes but avoid the worst cliffs.

route_choices.name: Smugglers Cut
route_choices.description: Short and profitable, with more archers on the ridge.

name: Courier Deadline
objective: Deliver the sealed dispatch before the warning expires.
bonus_objective: Arrive with at least 12 seconds remaining.
intro_text: A sealed dispatch, no questions asked, and a magistrate at the far end counting every minute. I don't much like carrying words I'm not allowed to read.
outro_text: The magistrate breaks the seal, not me. The pay is real enough.

route_choices.name: Main Road
route_choices.description: Steady travel with a more forgiving deadline.

route_choices.name: River Ford
route_choices.description: A faster ford, but the carriage will be exposed.

name: Bonebridge Pass
objective: Survive the haunted road and deliver the relics.
intro_text: The priests won't say why the temple relics must move tonight, only that the dead along Bonebridge grow bolder after dark. I've triple-checked the lanterns.
outro_text: The relics change hands at first light. I don't ask what followed us.

route_choices.name: Chapel Road
route_choices.description: Blessed stones reduce the worst undead pressure.

route_choices.name: Crypt Bridge
route_choices.description: A direct bridge watched by necromancers.

name: Prisoner Wagon
objective: Deliver the prisoner before rescuers can open the wagon.
intro_text: They've bolted a cage to my wagon and a bandit chief inside it. His men are still out there, and they want him back before the assizes do.
outro_text: The chief is behind bars, his men a day too late.

route_choices.name: Jailers Road
route_choices.description: More road time, fewer rescue attempts.

route_choices.name: Ravine Run
route_choices.description: Short ravine route with coordinated ambushes.

name: Medicine Run
objective: Keep fragile medicine potent and arrive before it spoils.
intro_text: Fever's taken hold in the marsh villages. The medicine spoils if it's jostled or slow, so this is a race against the road and the clock at once.
outro_text: The medicine arrives potent; by nightfall the fevers are breaking.

route_choices.name: Dry Ridge
route_choices.description: A slower ridge road that protects the medicine.

route_choices.name: Marsh Shortcut
route_choices.description: Fast, wet, and hard on the medicine crates.

name: Gold Shipment
objective: Move the gold shipment without letting raiders drain the strongbox.
intro_text: Royal gold, and every raider between here and the mint seems to already know it. The strongbox is only ever as safe as the guards riding beside it.
outro_text: The strongbox reaches the mint full. The guards get a bonus — so do I.

route_choices.name: Market Road
route_choices.description: Crowded but easier to defend.

route_choices.name: Toll Cut
route_choices.description: Avoid tolls and invite heavier raids.

name: Monster Egg Transport
objective: Keep the monster egg stable through impacts and attacks.
intro_text: The scholars call it an egg. It's warm to the touch and it hums when we hit a rut. I'd sooner be hauling the gold again.
outro_text: The scholars take their humming crate. Glad to be rid of it.

route_choices.name: Quarry Floor
route_choices.description: Longer, flatter, and safer for the egg.

route_choices.name: Ridge Lift
route_choices.description: Short and rocky with unstable drops.

name: Refugee Escort
objective: Protect frightened passengers until the carriage reaches safety.
intro_text: Families with everything they own piled on my wagon, and the border still a day off. Every wolf-howl sends the children into a panic I can't afford.
outro_text: The families cross the border safe. A child waves from the gate.

route_choices.name: Settlers Way
route_choices.description: More road, more cover, fewer panic spikes.

route_choices.name: Border Cut
route_choices.description: A dangerous cut that clears the border faster.

name: The Princess Road
objective: Arrive safely while keeping the ride comfortable.
intro_text: A royal passenger, a smooth ride demanded, and a road that is anything but. Comfort, they said, as if the ravines and ruts had ever heard the word.
outro_text: The passenger steps down unruffled. A smooth ride, delivered.

route_choices.name: Royal Parade
route_choices.description: A smoother road with a larger escort footprint.

route_choices.name: Hunting Lane
route_choices.description: Shorter but rougher and more exposed.

name: Royal Banquet Supplies
objective: Deliver feast supplies quickly while keeping them fresh.
intro_text: Glassware and delicacies for the palace feast, wanted fresh and wanted now. Break a single crate and I'll be paying it off for a year.
outro_text: Not a glass cracked, not a dish spoiled. The palace never knew.

route_choices.name: Stone Avenue
route_choices.description: Long, smooth, and kind to fragile glassware.

route_choices.name: Kitchen Cut
route_choices.description: A fast service road with heat and raiders.

name: Siege Supply Run
objective: Break through to the besieged keep with enough supplies intact.
bonus_objective: Arrive with at least 8 seconds to spare.
intro_text: The keep is surrounded and running dry. If the War Road doesn't kill me the reserve timer might, and this is the last wagon they're sending.
outro_text: The wagon breaks the line and the keep holds.

route_choices.name: Supply Column
route_choices.description: Move with allied wagons for a longer but steadier push.

route_choices.name: Breach Road
route_choices.description: Drive straight through the breach before enemies regroup.
